title: osmanthus henryi
intro: Osmanthus henryi is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the Henry's osmanthus or sweet osmanthus. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Osmanthus henryi include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Osmanthus henryi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
